headline: HP partners with OpenAI Frontier for enterprise AI deployment
summary: The two companies will co-develop AI agents for customer support, software development, and internal operations across HP's 180-country business

headline: HP, Intel, and Xerox Are All Chasing the Same Comeback. History Says Only One Survives
summary: HP, Intel, and Xerox all built the hardware world we grew up in, but the market now prices them as if they belong to different centuries. History offers a precise template for which kind of struggling giant survives long enough to matter again, and only one of these three fits it.

headline: HP (HPQ) Stock After Recent Pullback Is The Valuation Gap Too Wide?
summary: If you are wondering whether HP stock still offers value at around US$22.88, the answer depends on how you look at its valuation and what you expect from the business over time. The share price is up 3.4% year to date, but it has fallen 2.8% over the past week, 15.4% over the past month and 1.7% over the last year, which may change how investors think about both its potential and its risks. Recent coverage has focused on HP's position in the broader tech sector and how investors are weighing...
